prompt: A premium square advertising poster for AirPods Pro 3, styled like a modern tech campaign. Show a young woman centered in a soft studio setting with a smooth cool gray background, wearing a neon lime knit beanie and a black-and-white wavy striped top with lime trim. Her wavy shoulder-length hair is pastel pink, and one white wireless earbud is visible in her ear. Her face is partially obscured by a large centered rectangular blur block in warm beige-tan, covering most facial features. In the extreme foreground, her hand reaches toward the camera holding an open glossy white charging case, presented close to the lens with strong perspective distortion; inside are two white premium wireless earbuds angled visibly, and a tiny green status LED glows on the front of the case. Add two additional floating earbuds in the background on the right side, softly blurred, to suggest product variation and depth. Use shallow depth of field, crisp product highlights, smooth commercial lighting, subtle reflections, and polished high-end product photography mixed with fashion editorial portraiture. Overlay large bold white sans-serif headline text across the top reading AIRPODS. Place smaller white subheading text at upper right reading Apple Pods Pro 3. On the left side, add a 3-line white promotional copy block reading Premium sound and noise cancellation. On the lower right, add two large stacked numeric feature callouts in white: “30” with smaller text “hours of battery life.” and “1” with smaller text “year warranty.” Include subtle rainbow prism lens flares scattered around the image, especially near the edges and lower center, to create an iridescent futuristic feel. Composition should be clean, bold, glossy, aspirational, and unmistakably like a luxury consumer electronics social media ad.
